title: Selecting a Column and updating by Find/Replace ...Help
excerpt: I need to make a change to the data in my column by using Find and Replace, does not appear to be an option. Only allow you to select one and edit one at a time.

posts.author: fhiconsult (Bertha Cross)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to make a change to the data in my column by using Find and Replace, does not appear to be an option. Only allow you to select one and edit one at a time.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @fhiconsult,

You can now find and replace using the Toolkit app.
Here is further details about the app.

If you need any support with the app, you can reach out at support@kolaai.com
